records.name: Money Forward

reasons.notes: Convergence-test candidate — human review needed before consolidation.
Convergence-test candidate — human review needed before consolidation.

records.rawExplanation: *2021 (SaaS-mania peak + deliberate investment phase):* stock ¥3,940 (Mar 25) – ¥9,190 (Sep 6) per Nikkei 10-year history; Sep 2021 peak ¥9,190 was the all-time high in the 5-year window. FY11/2021 numbers not directly surfaced as exact figures, but multi-year-trend snippet shows 2-year revenue CAGR around +28.7% with sustained operating losses by deliberate strategic investment in SaaS growth, customer-account expansion, and platform features. Stock-move catalyst: 2021 SaaS-mania wave + Money Forward's hypergrowth revenue trajectory + strategic investment narrative (front-loaded investment, ARR-growth focus, deliberate margin compression for scale). Sign summary: revenue rose strongly on SaaS-mania-era hypergrowth; shares rallied to all-time high ¥9,190 (Sep 6); business strong, stock strong but priced on hype. 業績 ◎ (revenue) with deliberate-investment profit dip / 株価 ◎◎ (peak).

records.rawExplanation: *2022 (post-mania derating + deliberate investment continues):* stock ¥2,781 (Jul 19) – ¥6,970 (Jan 4); from Sep 2021 peak ¥9,190 to Jul 2022 trough ¥2,781 = approximately -70% over 10 months. FY11/2022 trend: revenue rose on continued SaaS / ARR growth; operating losses sustained by deliberate strategic investment in growth (new SMB customer acquisition, mid-market expansion). Stock-move catalyst for the post-Sep-2021 collapse: 2022 global growth-stock + SaaS multiple compression (the same pattern as PLAID 2022, Rakus 2022). Sign summary: revenue rose on deliberate growth investment; operating losses sustained by self-inflicted strategic investment in ARR expansion; shares fell sharply to ¥2,781 multi-year low (Jul 19); business strong revenue / deliberate profit dip; stock depressed. 業績 ◎ (revenue) deliberate investment / 株価 ✕✕ (-70% derating).

records.rawExplanation: *2023 (revenue compounding while stock stays de-rated):* stock ¥3,367 (Oct 26) – ¥6,487 (Jun 19); range-bound, no recovery to 2021 peak. FY11/2023 trend: revenue continued growing strongly (≥+28% YoY); SaaS ARR up sharply driven by インボイス制度 (invoice system) tailwind announced — Money Forward's invoice management products benefited; operating losses sustained by deliberate front-loaded investment. Sign summary: revenue rose on continued deliberate growth investment; SaaS ARR grew sharply driven by インボイス system rollout; operating losses sustained by self-inflicted strategic investment; shares range-bound. 業績 ◎ (revenue + ARR) deliberate investment / 株価 ✕ (under-priced de-rated grower at scale).

records.rawExplanation: *2024 (EBITDA inflection — deliberate-investment maturing):* stock ¥3,972 (Jan 5) – ¥6,947 (Mar 4); range-bound, didn't break out. **FY11/2024 actual: revenue ¥40,360M (+33% YoY), operating loss ¥(4,735)M, SaaS ARR ¥30,000M (+30% YoY); EBITDA achieved company guidance, EBITDA margin improved by +10–15pt YoY** per ログミー coverage. **Q1 FY11/2024 was the first quarter with EBITDA turn to black** — the deliberate investment is starting to mature. Sign summary: revenue rose +33% YoY; SaaS ARR rose +30%; EBITDA turn to black on quarterly basis; operating loss sustained by self-inflicted strategic investment; shares range-bound. 業績 ◎ (revenue accelerating + EBITDA maturing) deliberate investment / 株価 ✕ (still under-priced).

records.rawExplanation:
*2025 (NET profit turn-to-black — recovery confirmed):* stock ¥3,330 (Apr 9) – ¥6,794 (Aug 19); reached ¥6,794 Aug 19 high but range-bound overall. **FY11/2025 actual (announced Jan 14, 2026): revenue ¥51,200M (+27% YoY); operating loss narrowed to ¥(2,653)M from ¥(4,735)M; net profit ¥1,587M (FIRST FULL-YEAR NET PROFIT IN COMPANY HISTORY — turn to black from a ¥4,735M operating loss prior period); SaaS ARR ¥39,333M (+31.1% YoY) — ARR growth ACCELERATING; SMB customer-count net adds at record, midsize ARR record; EBITDA margin record; Business domain revenue ¥27,031M (+33% YoY) led growth** per ログミー + 決算短信. AI Agent / "AI Cowork" platform launched July 2026 as next growth driver. Sign summary: revenue rose +27% YoY; SaaS ARR rose +31% YoY accelerating; net profit turned to black at ¥1,587M from a ¥4,735M operating loss prior period; EBITDA margin record; investment-payoff inflection; shares rallied to ¥6,794 high (Aug 19); business strong, stock recovering. 業績 ◎◎ (revenue + profit-turn-to-black, investment-payoff inflection) / 株価 ◎ (recovery beginning).

Cautious side: stock still well below the 2021 SaaS-mania peak of ¥9,190 (Aug 2025 high of ¥6,794 = -26% off all-time high); operating loss still sustained at full-year level (only net line turned to black due to other-income factors); deliberate-investment thesis depends on continued ARR acceleration; competitive SaaS pricing pressure from larger global players.

Sources:
- https://finance.logmi.jp/articles/380983 (FY11/2024 通期決算 + FY25 guidance + record net-adds)
- https://finance.logmi.jp/articles/379416 (Q1 FY24 EBITDA black + ARR record net adds)
- https://finance.logmi.jp/articles/382836 (FY11/2025 record EBITDA + AI Cowork narrative)
- https://finance.logmi.jp/articles/384453 (Q1 FY26 quarterly OP record + AI Cowork July 2026 launch)
- https://finance-frontend-pc-dist.west.edge.storage-yahoo.jp/disclosure/20260114/20260114533704.pdf (FY11/2025 通期決算短信 Jan 14, 2026)
- https://finance.logmi.jp/articles/378626 (SaaS ARR +40% inflection driven by インボイス tailwind)
- https://irbank.net/E33390 (multi-year P/L history)
- https://www.nikkei.com/nkd/company/history/yprice/?scode=3994 (Nikkei 10-year price history)
records.bearCase: stock still well below the 2021 SaaS-mania peak of ¥9,190 (Aug 2025 high of ¥6,794 = -26% off all-time high); operating loss still sustained at full-year level (only net line turned to black due to other-income factors); deliberate-investment thesis depends on continued ARR acceleration; competitive SaaS pricing pressure from larger global players
